title: Ancient Antarctic Ice Cycles Impacted Ocean Productivity Thousands of Miles Away
description: UW-Madison study links Antarctic ice sheet growth and decay to a 40,000-year rhythm in subtropical marine productivity.

title: Ancient human habitation unearthed: 125,000-year-old settlement discovered in Sharjah’s Buhais Rockshelter
description: For years, a site believed to have remained largely uninhabited between 60,000 and 12,000 years ago has been re-evaluated, as new research uncovers evidence of repeated human occupation at Buhais Rockshelter, an archaeological site in Sharjah, UAE. The findings challenge long-held assumptions about human settlement in southeastern Arabia and offer...
